dct_title_s: Insularum Maltaeæ et Gozaeæ : quaeæ sunt equitum S. Ioannis Hierosolimitani ordinis Melit. sedes principalis, delineatio geographica
dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Includes inset map of Valetta and view of the city.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Glen McLaughlin Map Collection – Maps of Malta courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
